title: VATIN Silver Organza Sheer Chevron Wired Ribbon with Metallic Edge, 63mm x 9 Metres for Christmas Tree Decoration
features: Size: Measures 63 mm in width with a continuous length of 9 metres; each package includes 1 roll for easy use and storage
Quality Material: Made from organza sheer fabric, offering an elegant shine; features soft iron wire on both sides for easy shaping and flexibility
Versatile Use: Ideal for decorating Christmas trees and various creative projects; light-transmitting material and glittering chevron pattern enhance decorative appeal
Design: Features a sparkle chevron pattern with a metallic edge; adds sophistication and festive charm to any decorative venture
Attention to Detail: Excess glitter may shed during use due to the printing method; this does not impact ribbon performance; recommended for use in easily cleanable areas
description: Size: This VATIN Chevron Glitter Wired Ribbon measures 63mm wide and comes in a continuous 9 metres length, providing you with ample ribbon for your decorations. Each package contains 1 roll, making it convenient for you to use and store. Quality Material: Crafted from organza sheer ribbon, this ribbon offers an elegant shine that adds beauty and charm to your Christmas decorations. The soft iron wire on both sides allows for easy shaping and fixing, giving you flexibility in your creative endeavors. Versatile Use: The light-transmitting material and the glittering Swirl pattern on the surface make this ribbon perfect for decorating Christmas trees. It can also be used for various creative and decorative projects, allowing your imagination to run wild. Design: This VATIN ribbon features a high-quality organza sheer fabric with a sparkle swirl pattern and metallic edge, adding a touch of sophistication to your Christmas theme. It is suitable for any creative or decorative venture you can think of, bringing festive cheer to your surroundings. Attention to Detail: Please note that in order to achieve the best glitter effect, the printing method we adopt may cause excess glitter on the surface to fall off. However, this does not affect the performance of the ribbon. We recommend using it in an easily cleanable area for your convenience.
